arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Lazio: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Lazio prepare for their upcoming match with several notable changes to their starting lineup. Nuno Tavares, the Serie A assist leader, remains sidelined, with Luca Pellegrini expected to continue at left-back. Several crucial players are set to make their comeback to the starting eleven. Nicolo Rovella, who was rested in the Europa League, will return to midfield. Top scorer Taty Castellanos, first-choice goalkeeper Ivan Provedel, and captain Mattia Zaccagni are also expected to reclaim their positions. Zaccagni enters the match with remarkable momentum, having scored in his last three league games against Cagliari, Monza, and Bologna. arts.ttl: Lazio will look for continuity against Parma
arts.sum: Lazio have won each of their last nine Serie A games against Parma between 2014 and 2021; only against Udinese have they gone on a longer such streak (10 wins in a row between 1998 and 2003) in their top-flight history. Parma have lost each of their last nine Serie A games against Lazio, with an aggregate score of 21-4 for the Biancocelesti; it’s their longest streak of successive defeats ever suffered against a single opponent in the top-flight.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Lazio: Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: As the Serie A season intensifies, Parma are set to host Lazio at Stadio Ennio Tardini on Sunday afternoon. This match promises to be a thrilling encounter as Lazio aims to maintain their strong position in the league standings, while Parma fights to avoid slipping further into relegation danger. Lazio have been in impressive form, having won five consecutive Serie A matches, scoring 14 goals and conceding just two.
